description: Detects race condition risks in Go: goroutines spawned inside for loops (loop variable capture risk). JSON version matches for_statement containing statement_list containing go_statement. Languages field scoped to go only to avoid conflict with Rust race_conditions pipeline (same pipeline name). Go grammar wraps block contents in statement_list node.

flag.message: goroutine spawned inside for loop -- loop variable may be captured by reference causing race conditions
